title: Pappobolus viridior
taxonomy: Pappobolus viridior is classified within the family Asteraceae. This plant belongs to the subfamily Heliantheae. It is a part of the genus Pappobolus. Pappobolus viridior is native to Mexico and Central America, where it grows as an annual herb. Its classification places it among the flowering plants, specifically within the dicotyledons.
uses: Pappobolus viridior is a plant species that has been studied for its potential medicinal properties, although information on its uses is limited.
